wvnews.title: Shooting at Chicago hospital leads to lockdown
wvnews.description: A shooting at a hospital in Chicago has led to its campus being put on lockdown. The Endeavor Health Swedish Hospital campus said Saturday that patients and staff were safe and that by midafternoon there was no active threat. The…

wvnews.description: The Cincinnati Reds have signed Brandon Phillips to a ceremonial one-day contract to ensure the four-time Gold Glove Award winner would retire a Red. Phillips also was inducted into the Reds Hall of Fame on Saturday. He spent 11 seasons…

wvnews.description: Mohamed Salah may have played his last game for Liverpool after he was injured in the win against Crystal Palace. Salah is leaving Anfield at the end of the season. Liverpool coach Arne Slot says he did not know how…

wvnews.title: Georgia wildfires that destroyed more than 120 homes continue to threaten residents
